meta.title: Tournament Management
meta.description: Manage tournament placements, level credits, and avatar frame cosmetics

title: Tournament Management
subtitle: Create events, enter placements, sync level credits, and attach avatar frame cosmetics.
emptyList: No tournaments yet. Create one or import a CSV.
selectTournamentFirst: Select a tournament from the Events tab first.

packImport.title: Import from pack
packImport.subtitle: Import nominee placements from a pack reference, then review the diff before applying.

nominees.title: Pick nominees
nominees.allSelected: All eligible creators selected (empty filter = everyone on sync)
nominees.empty: No eligible creators on this level.

help.title: Tournament placements help
help.subtitle: Modes, expansion, credits, weights, and pack import.

modes.title: Placement modes
modes.intro: Each row can inherit the tournament default or override it.

bullets.profile: Profile — links a player or creator; optional level is evidence only.
bullets.level: Level — expands to creators on the level after Sync.
bullets.inherit: Inherit — uses the tournament placement mode from Details.

evidence.title: Evidence vs expansion
evidence.intro: Attaching a level on a profile row does not create extra credits.

bullets.profileLevel: Profile + levelId shows the level as context on the card.
bullets.noExpand: Only level-mode rows expand to multiple profile credits.

nominees.title: Nominees filter
nominees.intro: Level rows store an optional recipient filter before Sync.

bullets.prefill: Pick nominees is prefilled from level credits (charter/vfxer by default).
bullets.emptyFilter: An empty filter at Sync means everyone eligible on the level.
bullets.guests: Guests can be included; they show a warning badge in the picker.

sync.title: Sync credits
sync.intro: Saving placements does not materialize level credits.

bullets.dryRun: Sync runs a dry-run preview of adds/removes before you confirm.
bullets.saveVsSync: Save stores row metadata; Sync writes tournament_placement_credits.

weights.title: Sort weights
weights.intro: Series and tournament lists use dense 1..n weights.

bullets.series: Reorder series on the Series tab with up/down controls.
bullets.tier: Placements are sorted by tier rank weight in the editor.

pack.title: Pack import
pack.intro: Import nominee placements from pack tools, then diff-sync.

bullets.import: New pack entries import as NOM (nominee) placements.
bullets.diff: Diff sync proposes adds/removes; diverged rows need manual review.

cosmetics.title: Cosmetics / avatar frames
cosmetics.intro: Rewards grant one entitlement per matching credit.

bullets.perCredit: Entitlements key off credit IDs, not placement IDs.
bullets.entitlements: Use Sync entitlements after changing reward rules or credits.

series.name: Name
series.empty: No series yet. Use the form above to add one.
series.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? Linked events will be unlinked and series-only rewards will be removed.

deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}" and all placements, credits, and rewards?

popup.title: Manage tournament
popup.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}" and all placements, credits, and rewards?
popup.unsavedConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Discard them and leave?

tiers.label: Label
tiers.saveFirst: Save tiers before uploading tier images

preset.label: Add by preset
preset.hint: Append tiers from a preset. Existing codes are skipped. Save tiers when done.
preset.allExist: All tiers from this preset already exist

errors.shortNameExists: A tournament with this short name already exists.
